title: DTCC eyes October tokenized securities launch with 50 DeFi and TradFi giants
snippet: With $114 trillion in custodied liquid assets, Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation looks to position tokenization as the future of existing financial system.

title: a16z crypto raises $2.2 billion for fifth fund, promotes CTO to general partner
snippet: a16z crypto has raised $2.2 billion for its fifth fund as it points to growing use of stablecoins, onchain finance, and improving regulation.

title: Bullish to acquire Equiniti in $4.2 billion deal combining transfer agent and tokenization stack

title: Securitize taps Jump as market maker for trading tokenized stocks on ATS
snippet: Securitize, the company best known for tokenizing BlackRock’s BUIDL money market fund, is gradually announcing the building blocks of its tokenized stock and trading strategy. The latest announcement is the addition of Jump Trading as liquidity provider for its trading venue, the Securitize Markets

title: State Street and Galaxy launch fund on Solana designed to ‘sweep’ stablecoins into productive vehicle
snippet: The State Street Galaxy Onchain Liquidity Sweep Fund lets investors push stablecoins into a yield-bearing tokenized fund.

title: FalconX and Sygnum partner to launch tokenized credit offering for institutional clients
snippet: FalconX’s facility extends credit through a special-purpose vehicle, backed by overcollateralized loans and monitored in real time.

title: Kraken partners with MoneyGram for global crypto cash-outs

title: Europe should weigh tokenized SEPA payments, Bank of Italy official says
snippet: The Bank of Italy’s deputy governor floated the evaluation of tokenized SEPA payments, as the ECB experiments with tokenized digital payment frameworks to avoid stablecoin competition.

title: Polygon rolls out private stablecoin payments targeting institutions
snippet: The new wallet feature hides senders, receivers and amounts onchain while maintaining compliance through know your transaction screening and auditable files.
